daily.today_energy: Your inner fire is crackling today, Leo. There's a magnetic pull drawing people toward your authenticity. Trust that gravitational force—it's no accident. Let yourself be fully seen.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Single? Someone's been noticing your energy from a distance. Don't dim yourself down waiting for permission to shine.
daily.career: Your ideas have weight today. Speak up in that meeting or conversation—people are actually listening. Your confidence isn't arrogance; it's just clarity. Own it.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move intentionally today, not just for the sake of it. Whether that's dancing, stretching, or a walk, let it be joyful. Rest when you need it without guilt.

weekly.overview: Your energy is shifting into introspective mode this week, Leo. The cosmos is inviting you to pause the performance and check in with what actually lights you up. Trust the quiet moments—they're organizing your next-level moves.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing you differently. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a vulnerability moment brewing that could deepen things. Let people see the real you beneath the crown. That's your actual superpower.
weekly.career: Stop waiting for permission to level up. Your ideas are solid, and this week's energy supports you advocating for what you deserve. Small actions now plant seeds for bigger opportunities. Show up authentically at work.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and less overthinking. Movement feels good when it's joyful, not punishing. Hydrate more than usual and trust your instincts about what your system actually needs right now.
